outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran warns American forces in Strait of Hormuz will be attacked if US guides ships
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Iran's threat to attack US forces in Hormuz as Project Freedom begins. CENTCOM denies Fars News claim of frigate hit. Also: 'Two months into the Iran war, almost everybody is a loser.'

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump says the US will 'guide' stranded ships from the Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: WaPo emphasizes humanitarian framing vs. military escalation risk. Notes poll showing 61% say war a 'mistake' — Iraq/Vietnam-era disapproval.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump announces 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox frames Project Freedom as decisive action. Hegseth: 'dominant control of airspace.' Covers CENTCOM denial of Iranian frigate claim. Rubio: 'international waterways.'

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: AAA: Gas prices spike 33 cents in a week to $4.45
outlets.summary: Fox Business focuses on consumer impact: gas $4.45 national average, 6 states above $5.00, California $6.10. Biggest weekly jump since ceasefire announced.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: US denies frigate hit by missiles in Hormuz Strait
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog leads with disputed Fars News frigate claim and CENTCOM denial. Also covers Iran 14-point proposal analysis and Israel's first evacuation orders north of Litani.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran submits a 14-point response to a U.S. proposal to end war
outlets.summary: NPR provides detailed analysis of Iran's 14-point peace proposal: demands 30-day war end, US withdrawal, sanctions relief, reparations, Hormuz governance mechanism.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran threatens American ships if they enter Hormuz, as US kicks off 'Project Freedom'
outlets.summary: ToI leads with IRGC threat to attack any foreign forces in Hormuz. Covers Fars News frigate claim and CENTCOM denial. Notes Iran's military command warning.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Hostilities Between U.S. and Iran Are 'Likely' to Resume, Says Iranian Senior Commander
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports IRGC commander stating hostilities 'likely' to resume. Also covers Israel expanding evacuation north of Litani and continued Lebanon strikes.

outlets.name: Fars News (IRGC)
outlets.headline: Two missiles struck US Navy frigate near Jask island — vessel ignored IRGC warnings
outlets.summary: IRGC-affiliated Fars News claims two missiles hit US frigate near Jask. CENTCOM denies. No independent confirmation. Iranian media frames as legitimate defense of sovereign waters against Project Freedom.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei calls for 'economic and cultural jihad' against enemies
outlets.summary: Iran International covers Mojtaba Khamenei's call for economic jihad and domestic production push. Also: Araghchi-Lavrov call on peace prospects; IRGC warns of 'new management' for Hormuz.
